description: Small fragment of a legal document. Dating: probably 13th–15th century. Mentions various sums of thousands of dinars (4000 and 7000 and 3000), [...] b. Yaʿqūb zaqen ha-qahal, another name, and sugar candy (sukkar nabāt). (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
